Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For New Trial

(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion For New Trial
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Ashwin V. Ladva, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and reponding party, AMAURY RIVER.
Robert Cohen, Esq., appearing for Defendant and moving party Team Golden Gate, Inc.
Defendant Team Golden Gate, Inc.'s Motion for New Trial pursuant to C.C.P. 657, et seq. 473(b) is scheduled this day.
After argument of respective counsel the court granted Defendant's Motion for New Trial. Court ordered motion granted. Court ordered Judgment entered on January 6, 2014 set aside and vacated. Court ordered a Court Trial Date of March 24, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 514.
Court denied defendant's request for a Jury Trial. Court ordered Discovery closed.
Order signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2014 Continued To Jan-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Department 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Ashwin Ladva, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Amaury Rivera. Mike Stephens, Esq., present in court.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Team Golden Gate, Inc.
Plaintiff Amaury Rivera sworn and examined on her own behalf.
The following exhibits were marked for Identification and admitted in evidence:
Exhibit A. Summary of Exhbits B & C calculations.
Exhibit B. Clock & Out Time periods produced by Team Golden Gate, Inc.
Exhibit C. Amount of monies received by Mr. Rivera.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of AMAURY RIVERA and against Defendant TEAM GOLDEN GATE, INC. as follows:
Damages $43,733.60
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $14,000.00
Costs $680.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $58,413.60
Judgment signed in open court.
Original Exhibits returned to counsel for the care and custody of the court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
